title: Escape from Egghead — Chapter 1120
main_description: The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction. This chapter contains 6 structured story parts and 162 cleaned dialogue lines.
key_events: The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.
The display-ready parts preserve the cleaned dialogue while keeping uncertain speakers clearly marked.
